reviews.comment:
Generalmente llena de gente atentos a los cambios de turno 6 14 22 hs por que mientras se hace el cambio de turno no se carga combustible por 10 minutos

(Translated by Google)
Usually crowded with people, pay attention to the shift changes (6, 14, 22 hours) because fuel is not dispensed for 10 minutes during the shift change.
